title: Define Wave 14 provider identity and availability ownership contract
description: Extend architecture docs to define how provider identity is resolved from session context, how mobile/editor states map to identity mismatch scenarios, and which API contract protects role boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Provider identity source is explicit for authenticated provider app flows
Role/ownership constraints are mapped to API responses and UI states
Wave 14 contract references existing Wave 13 availability endpoints without breaking compatibility
